caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back is captured in a medium shot against a plain white background. She wears a dark blazer over a red top and stands behind a surface where a clear plastic water bottle is visible. A thin microphone is positioned in front of her. Her hands are clasped together in front of her waist. Throughout the sequence, she remains in the same position, subtly shifting her gaze and facial expression while appearing to speak. At the top of the scene, the logo "mediasite by cornerstone" is visible. The woman's posture and orientation stay consistent, with only minor movements in her head and mouth as she addresses someone off-screen.
